title: viburnum carlesii var. carlesii
intro: Viburnum carlesii var. carlesii, also known as the Korean Spice Viburnum, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and attractive foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Viburnum carlesii var. carlesii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
